passes.scope: Read the complete synthetic manuscript in source order.
Reconcile the proposition, boundary case, interpretation, and writing across the manuscript.
Recheck minor correctness, definitions, notation, cross-references, and cross-section consistency across the complete short manuscript.
Revisit the complete source and every active burden without using the retained findings as a checklist.

candidates.provisional_issue: The global uniqueness claim appears to fail at the equality boundary.
candidates.consequence: The headline proposition would overstate the model prediction at equality.
candidates.proposed_repair: Add a tie-breaking rule or state the equilibrium as set-valued at equality.
candidates.strongest_author_reply: The equality case may be implicitly excluded by the parameter domain.
candidates.disposition_reason: The source includes the equality case and provides no tie-breaking rule.

candidates.provisional_issue: The proposition summary appears to contain a subject-verb agreement error.
candidates.consequence: The error is conspicuous in the sentence summarizing the main proposition.
candidates.disposition_reason: The singular subject requires the verb form 'characterizes'.
